message:
feat(python): numpy.ma.filled wrapper parity (franken_numpy-yh61)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.ma.filled that replaces masked
elements with either an explicit fill_value or the MaskedArray's
intrinsic fill_value attribute, returning a plain ndarray. Test covers
masked arrays with intrinsic fill, explicit overrides, plain ndarray
pass-through, fully-masked inputs, unmasked masked arrays, 2-D inputs,
and NaN fill_value preservation against live numpy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
